name: next-step-rights
description: הצעד הבא — rights portal for limb amputees in Israel (RTL Hebrew). React + TypeScript frontend with an Express backend service.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace backend & npm run dev --workspace frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace backend && npm run build --workspace frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace frontend && npm run lint --workspace backend
